name: Michael "Mike" Stoughton
description:
Meeting up to hang out with your best friend, Mike! (Who also has a crush on you) I don't see many Mike bots compared to Steven ones so here!! I might make a Steven one too though. :3 PS: This takes place before the trade incident! This bot also has my personal headcanons so.. yeah

(Art by @orangehez on Twitter!! :3)

Edit: what the flip what are you guys doing with him… (thanks for 7k chats!!)
